name: process-diagram
description: Evaluate and improve process diagram slides — workflow steps, handoffs, and transformation flows
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with end-to-end process clarity, constrained step count, and explicit handoff logic

prompts.text: Build a process diagram slide for order-to-cash with order entry, fulfillment, invoicing, collections, and cash application
Build a process diagram for incident response from detection through triage, containment, remediation, recovery, and review
Build a hiring workflow slide from sourcing to screen, interview, offer, and onboarding
Build a procurement process diagram from request through approval, sourcing, PO, delivery, and payment
Build a software release process slide with build, test, approve, deploy, monitor, and rollback steps
Build a customer escalation process slide from issue intake to resolution and postmortem
Build a data pipeline process slide from source ingestion to transform, quality check, publish, and dashboard consumption
Build an integration decision process slide from synergy hypothesis through validation, decision, execution, and tracking
Build an insurance claims process diagram from first notice of loss through review, assessment, payment, and closure
Build a product feedback loop process slide from signal capture through prioritization, build, release, and measure
